name: User Ratings
description: Allow users to rate and review movies, TV shows, and music. See what other users on your server think!
overview: Social rating system for Jellyfin - rate content and see ratings from other users on your server

versions.changelog: Fixed: Back button now returns to the User Ratings tab when you opened a details page from it (previously always went to Home or Favourites).

### Fixed  - **Recently Rated / Oldest Rated Sort Broken** — `lastRatedTimestamp` was stored as an ISO date string from the API, causing `NaN` in the arithmetic sort comparisons — the \"Recently Rated\" and \"Oldest Rated\" sort options were silent no-ops. Now converted to epoch milliseconds at mapping time via `new Date(item.lastRated).getTime()`.  ### Changed  - **Sort Direction Toggle** — Replaced paired sort options (e.g. `Rating: High to Low` / `Rating: Low to High`, `Recently Rated` / `
### Fixed  - **Backup Files Table Width** — Changed table from full-width (`width: 100%`) to auto-fit (`width: auto`) so it renders compactly instead of stretching across the entire config page.

Fixed plugin config page CSS not loading (style block was stripped by Jellyfin). Added backup file download/restore/delete/upload. Centered button text, improved input styling, widened backup path input, added table borders.
Changed middleware script injection log from Information to Debug level to avoid flooding Jellyfin logs on every page load.

Provider ID resolution, self-healing ratings, database health checks, and automatic backups. Ratings matched by ItemId then provider IDs (IMDB, TMDB, TVDB). Automatic re-linking when item IDs change. Scheduled backups with configurable interval and retention. Fail-safe per-entry loading.
